race.comment: POSITIVE IMAGE (3) ran a strong second over 1107m at this track two runs back then was below his best last time over 1200m when 12th, beaten 10 lengths. Can bounce back in what looks a relatively thin race after scratchings. APACHE SUNRISE (4) is a three-year-old filly who is still a maiden after six starts but has been in the placings two times. Should improve off an even showing fresh and has claims. PACKERS JOURNEY (10) could only manage to finish fifth, beaten 5.5 lengths, after being prominent at the corner at her latest appearance over 1350m at Donald. Can give cheek. CORAL JET (1) made strides last time in and can be further improved this preparation, consider from a good draw.
